description: Evaluation dataset for E-Commerce Customer Service Multi-Agent System

test_cases.input: What's the status of order ORD-2024-10002?
test_cases.ground_truth: Order ORD-2024-10002 is shipped via UPS with tracking number 1Z999AA10123456784

test_cases.input: Can you track my shipment for order ORD-2024-10009?
test_cases.ground_truth: Order shipped via DHL, tracking number DHL1234567890, estimated delivery 2025-01-10

test_cases.input: I want to return order ORD-2024-10001. The headphones don't fit well.
test_cases.ground_truth: Return request submitted for delivered order within 30-day window

test_cases.input: I need to cancel order ORD-2024-10005. I changed my mind.
test_cases.ground_truth: Order ORD-2024-10005 is pending and can be cancelled

test_cases.input: Show me my recent orders for john.smith@email.com
test_cases.ground_truth: Customer has multiple orders including ORD-2024-10001 and ORD-2024-10004

test_cases.input: Where is order ORD-9999-99999?
test_cases.ground_truth: Order not found - should ask customer to verify order number

test_cases.input: Do you have any wireless headphones with noise cancellation?
test_cases.ground_truth: Should find PROD-001 Wireless Bluetooth Headphones with ANC

test_cases.input: Is the 4K webcam PROD-088 in stock?
test_cases.ground_truth: PROD-088 is out of stock, restock expected 2025-01-15

test_cases.input: I just bought wireless headphones. What accessories would you recommend?
test_cases.ground_truth: Should recommend complementary products like cases, stands, or cables

test_cases.input: Compare the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones PROD-001 with the Noise Canceling Earbuds PROD-055
test_cases.ground_truth: Compare over-ear headphones ($79.99) vs true wireless earbuds ($149.99)

test_cases.input: What's your return policy for electronics?
test_cases.ground_truth: 30-day return policy for electronics in original condition

test_cases.input: Tell me about the Smart Watch Pro PROD-015
test_cases.ground_truth: Smart Watch Pro at $299.99 with GPS, health monitoring, 7-day battery

test_cases.input: What's my account status for sarah.johnson@email.com?
test_cases.ground_truth: Sarah Johnson has active platinum membership

test_cases.input: I forgot my password for john.smith@email.com. Can you help me reset it?
test_cases.ground_truth: Password reset email sent to registered address

test_cases.input: What benefits do I get with Gold membership?
test_cases.ground_truth: Gold benefits include free shipping over $25, 1.5x points, early sale access

test_cases.input: I need to update my shipping address to 555 New Street, San Francisco, CA 94102
test_cases.ground_truth: Shipping address updated successfully

test_cases.input: What payment methods do I have on file for david.lee@email.com?
test_cases.ground_truth: David Lee has Visa ending in 7777 (default) and Mastercard ending in 8888

test_cases.input: Why can't I place orders? My email is lisa.martinez@email.com
test_cases.ground_truth: Account suspended due to payment dispute - needs to contact support

test_cases.input: I want to return order ORD-2024-10001 and buy a better pair of headphones instead. What do you recommend?
test_cases.ground_truth: Process return for ORD-2024-10001 and recommend alternative headphones

test_cases.input: Update my address for mike.wilson@email.com and also check if my order ORD-2024-10003 has shipped yet
test_cases.ground_truth: Address requires input and order is still processing

test_cases.input: I'm a Gold member and want to know my benefits. Also, is the ergonomic chair PROD-101 available?
test_cases.ground_truth: Gold benefits and ergonomic chair in stock (25 available)

test_cases.input: yo wheres my stuff order 10002
test_cases.ground_truth: Should handle informal language and incomplete order ID

test_cases.input: What's the status of my return for ORD-2024-10006?
test_cases.ground_truth: Order has return_requested status, pending approval

test_cases.input: What's the weather like today?
test_cases.ground_truth: Should politely decline and redirect to customer service capabilities

test_cases.input: Where's my refund for order ORD-2024-10007?
test_cases.ground_truth: Order was refunded $199.99 on 2024-12-10

metrics.goal_success_rate: Did the agent achieve the customer's goal?
metrics.tool_selection_accuracy: Did the agent use the correct tools?
metrics.routing_accuracy: Did the orchestrator route to the correct agent?
metrics.response_quality: Was the response helpful, accurate, and professional?
metrics.policy_compliance: Did the response follow company policies?
